title: Regional utility opens AI data center tariff review
summary: A regional utility opened a tariff review for large AI data center loads, but the filing does not include customer names or delivery dates.
articleText: A regional utility opened a tariff review for large AI data center loads. The filing says new rate structures may be needed when large customers request firm power service. The utility did not name the customers or give delivery dates for new capacity. Regulators asked for comments on cost allocation, interconnection timing, and how grid upgrades should be assigned. The source gives operators a useful watch item, but it does not yet prove that a specific data center campus has committed capacity or a firm energization schedule.
